_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Shri Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga Temple
temples.description: A major Jyotirlinga shrine in Ujjain. The temple management describes Mahakaleshwar as the only south-facing Jyotirlinga among the twelve.

temples.name: Omkareshwar Jyotirlinga Temple
temples.description: A revered Jyotirlinga shrine on Mandhata Island in the Narmada River near Khandwa.

temples.name: Bhojeshwar Mahadev Temple
temples.description: A historic Shiva temple at Bhojpur, known for its large lingam and unfinished monumental stone architecture.

temples.name: Harsiddhi Temple
temples.description: An ancient Shakti shrine in Ujjain, listed by the district administration among the city's sacred places.

temples.name: Ram Raja Temple
temples.description: A distinctive Orchha shrine where Lord Rama is worshipped as king, highlighted by Madhya Pradesh Tourism.

temples.name: Kandariya Mahadeva Temple
temples.description: One of the tallest temples in Khajuraho and a major Shiva temple within the Khajuraho temple landscape.

temples.name: Chausath Yogini Temple, Bhedaghat
temples.description: A historic Yogini temple near Bhedaghat, listed by Madhya Pradesh Tourism among the major attractions around the Narmada marble rocks.
